case_title: MCQUAID BEDFORD & VAN ZANDT LLP VS. AIRCRAFT FUELING SYSTEMS, INC.

docket_entries.description: POS: COMPLAINT FOR OPEN-BOOK ACCOUNT, ACCOUNT STATED, SERVICES AND MATERIAL SUPPLIED AND BREACH OF CONTRACT; [PROPOSED] JUDMGENT PURSUANT TO STIP; AND POS & NOTICE OF ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF RECEIPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCQUAID BEDFORD & VAN ZANDT LLP

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCQUAID BEDFORD & VAN ZANDT LLP AS TO DEFENDANT AIRCRAFT FUELING SYSTEMS, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-02-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-18-2008
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCQUAID BEDFORD & VAN ZANDT LLP ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRCRAFT FUELING SYSTEMS, INC.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRCRAFT FUELING SYSTEMS, INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCQUAID BEDFORD & VAN ZANDT LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRCRAFT FUELING SYSTEMS, INC. $63,463.71 PRINCIPAL, $3,046.26 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $66,844.97, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE STAY SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY
